executive_summary: Latest updates from 1 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 1 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Israel prepared to keep striking Iran for 'weeks to come', military spokesperson. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Israel prepared to keep striking Iran for 'weeks to come', military spokesperson
key_developments.detail: Israel is prepared for "weeks" more of attacks on Iran, a military spokesman said on Tuesday after Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said in an interview that the war was "beyond the halfway point". Lieutenant Colonel Nadav Shoshani told reporters the decision was up to political leaders, but said "
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Israel is prepared for "weeks" more of attacks on Iran, a military spokesman said on Tuesday after Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said in an interview that the war was "beyond the halfway point". Lieutenant Colonel Nadav Shoshani told reporters the decision was up to political leaders, but said "

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
